productDisplayName: Timen Women Silver Toned Dial Watch T2N150
description: Article Number: T2N150Case style: Analogue watch with a round case and stainless steel back, has stone studded detail along the rimDial style: Silver toned dial with print detail, steel toned hour, minute and seconds hands, steel toned markings, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black leather strap with stitched detail, secured with a tang clasp, has two loopsWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
